stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA's GTC conference announced a $1T inference demand pipeline for 2026-2027, shifting focus from training to inference workloads. Economic implications include accelerated AI capex by hyperscalers. Market psychology: Priced for perfection, good news not moving stock much, but long-term bullish. Historical parallels: Post-2023 GTC rallies. Analogies: Like iPhone launch hype sustaining Apple; rocket fuel for AI economy amid war distractions.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: GTC announcements reinforce AI dominance; X sentiment mixed but positive on $1T forecast, web news highlights stock up 1.7% post-event despite broader market caution from oil/Fed.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long NVDA calls, potential 10% gain on AI hype continuation
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation, competition from AMD/Intel, geopolitical distraction from war.

stocks.justification: Strong fundamentals but stock muted reaction indicates high expectations baked in.

stocks.impact_theory: Middle East war escalations (Iran attacks) drove oil >$100/bbl, benefiting integrated majors. Implications: Higher revenues/margins. Psychology: Risk-on for energy amid supply fears. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine war oil spike. Analogies: Betting on fire during drought; tailwind from storm for sailors.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil surge from Hormuz tensions, X posts note shares to highs, web confirms energy up 1-3%.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick war resolution, SPR releases, recession curbing demand.

stocks.justification: Direct correlation to oil prices, clear catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: Similar to XOM, oil price climb from Iran war boosts upstream profits. Implications: Inflation hedge. Psychology: Flight to safety in commodities. Parallels: Gulf War 1990. Analogies: Profiting from chaos like war profiteer; rising tide lifts energy boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Energy sector rally, X mentions with XOM/OXY.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short on peace talks
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory pressures, dividend cut risk if prolonged low oil later.

stocks.justification: Proven track record in high oil environments.

stocks.impact_theory: Pure-play upstream benefits most from oil spike. Implications: Leverage to prices. Psychology: High beta play. Parallels: 2014 ISIS oil shock. Analogies: High-octane rocket vs steady ship.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Up 1.4% noted, X posts highlight with XLE.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil majors gaining on supply disruptions. Implications: EPS boost. Psychology: Sector rotation to energy. Parallels: Post-9/11 oil rally. Analogies: Feeding frenzy in high prices.
